name: Wordpress Blog Post Generator for WPML

parameters.content:
## Wordpress Blog Post Generator for WPML

### How it works

This workflow manually generates a multilingual WordPress blog post using an OpenAI-powered article generator. It creates posts in two languages, links them as translations through a custom WPML endpoint, generates a featured image, uploads it to WordPress, and assigns the image to both language versions.

### Setup steps

- Configure OpenAI credentials for the article-generation chain and featured-image node.
- Replace all `https://YOUR_URL` placeholders with the target WordPress site URL.
- Configure WordPress REST API authentication for the post, media upload, and featured image update HTTP Request nodes.
- Ensure WPML is installed and that the custom `/wp-json/custom/v1/link...` endpoint exists and can link translated posts.
- Adjust the prompt in the Set context node to define the article topic, languages, structure, and output fields expected by the structured parser.

### Customization

Modify the Set context prompt and structured output schema to change article format, target languages, tone, categories, tags, or image prompt behavior.

## Start and prompt setup

Manual trigger and initial context setup for the blog generation prompt.

## Generate article content

Uses the OpenAI chat model with a structured output parser to produce the multilingual article data consumed by the WordPress post creation steps.

## Create translated posts

Creates the first and second WordPress posts, then links them together as translations through the WPML/custom translation endpoint.

## Generate and upload image

Generates a featured image with OpenAI and uploads the resulting media file to the WordPress media library.

## Assign featured images

Updates both language-specific WordPress posts so they use the uploaded media item as their featured image.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $('Generate Article Text').item.json.output.title_en, content: $('Generate Article Text').item.json.output.text_en, status: "publish", lang: "en", translation_of1: $json.id  }) }}

messageValues.message:
=an SEO-friendly article on these topics: {{ $json.prompt }}  Instructions: - In the introduction, introduce the topic that will be covered in more detail in the rest of the text - The introduction should be about 60 words - The conclusion should be about 60 words - Use the conclusion to summarize everything said in the article and offer a conclusion to the reader - Write a maximum of 2-3 chapters. - Chapters should follow a logical flow and not repeat the same ideas. - Chapters should be related to each other and not isolated blocks of text. The text should flow and follow a linear logic. - Do not start chapters with "Chapter 1", "Chapter 2", "Chapter 3" ... write only the chapter title - For the text, use HTML for formatting, but limit yourself to bold, italics, paragraphs and lists. - Do not put the output between ```html but only the text - Do not use markdown for formatting. - Go deeper into the topic you are talking about, don't just throw superficial information out there - I only want HTML format in output

Write the article and title in italian and english

parameters.prompt:
=Generate a real photo image used as a blog post cover (without writing):

Image prompt:
{{ $('Generate Article Text').item.json.output.title_it }}, photography, realistic, sigma 85mm f/1.4
